items.briefing:
Australian organisations are being urged not to rely on a single AI provider, with LegalVision warning this creates significant operational and security risks if that provider experiences an outage or breach. Separately, UpGuard has found that pirate football streaming sites are linked to offshore betting operations, meaning staff who use these sites may be unknowingly exposing their devices and personal data to malicious actors.

Scammers are also using AI-generated images to sell fake exotic flower seeds online — a reminder that convincing visuals no longer guarantee a product is real. If you use AI tools at work, avoid entering sensitive organisational information into any AI platform without checking your organisation's approved tools list first.

featured.title: LegalVision warns firms on single AI provider risks
featured.quote: Australian firms face operational disruption risks from over-reliance on single AI providers without proper contracts.
